text: Design phase DONE (docs/spectral-backend-boundary.md committed): SpectralBackend contract, compose combinator, none fallback, raw carriers + facade canonicalization, GeneralizedEigenDecomposition sketch, seam inventory, laws-as-conformance, migration sketch. Adversarially reviewed — 3 confirmed errors fixed (private[gale] subpackage visibility does NOT wall out gale.backend.* -> private[spectral] tightening is migration step 0; stale S3 seam re-scoped after left-eigenvectors shipped; QZ infinite-eigenvalue conformance law corrected to |Bx|). PHASE 2 remaining before close: implement the boundary skeleton per the migration sketch — SpectralBackend trait + none + compose in core, private[spectral] constructor tightening, QZ + rank-deficient-GSVD facade entries returning Left(UnsupportedOperation) via the none backend. Blocked on the left-eigenvectors bead releasing the core spectral paths.
